mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room (customer_id, manager_id, status, created_at) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{managerId}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id as id ,customer_id as customerId ,manager_id as managerId ,status as status ,created_at as createdAt FROM chat_room WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id as id ,customer_id as customerId ,manager_id as managerId ,status as status ,created_at as createdAt FROM chat_room ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id as id ,customer_id as customerId ,manager_id as managerId ,status as status ,created_at as createdAt FROM chat_room WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM chat_room WHERE status = 'CLOSE' AND closed_at <= #{time}
SELECT id, room_id, sender, message, created_at FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, username, role FROM member WHERE role IN ('MANAGER', 'PRODUCTER') AND id != #{senderId}
